description:
The WebSEAL runtime server is the Directory Server which contains the reverse proxy's user registry and policy server. This is typically a LDAP server external to the deployment, however an example LDAP server is made available to deployments for testing.

The Verify Identity Access specific LDAP schemas can be found in the System -> File Downloads section of an appliance/configuration container in the `isva` directory.

Any PKI required to verify this connection should be imported into a SSL database before the runtime component is configured.

policy_server.description: The mode for the policy server.

user_registry.description: Type of user registry to use.

clean_ldap.description: Remove any existing user data from registry. Only valid if user_registry is local.

isam_domain.description: The Security Verify Identity Access domain name.

admin_password.description: The password for the sec_master user.

admin_cert_lifetime.description: The lifetime in days for the SSL server certificate.

ssl_compliance.description: Specifies whether SSL is compliant with any additional computer security standard.

isam.description: Verify Identity Access policy server properties.

stanza_configuration.description: Optional list of modifications to configuration files.

override_config.description: Optional property to attempt to force a reconfiguration of the runtime component if it is already configured. This is not possible if there are reverse proxy objects.

embedded_root_password.description: The password to update the embedded LDAP server's root user secret. If provided and the runtime component is in the ``Available`` state, this property can be used to modify the embedded LDAP root user ``cn=root,secAuthority=Default`` secret.

host.description: Hostname or address for LDAP server.

port.description: Port LDAP server is listening on.

dn.description: Distinguished name to bind to LDAP server for admin operations.

key_file.description: SSL Database to use to verify connections to LDAP server.

cert_label.description: SSL Certificate label to verify connections to LDAP server.

ISAM.description: Verify Identity Access policy server properties.

host.description: Hostname or address of Verify Identity Access policy server.

port.description: Port that Verify Identity Access policy server is listening on.

operation.description: Operation to perform on configuration file.
